narrative:
Sugarcreek Village has 1,487 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.4 percentage points.
